forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 58. Southwest wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Thursday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 89. Southwest wind 3 to 8 mph.

weather_report:
As the cool night air begins to settle over Boston, a calm tranquility envelopes the city. Under a sky that hints at clarity, temperatures linger around a comfortable 58 degrees, complemented by a gentle southwest breeze that whispers through the stillness. The city lights blink softly against the dark canvas, creating a captivating contrast that invites contemplation. 

Come morning, a splendid day awaits, revealing itself in a panorama of sunshine, promising warmth that flirts with the 89-degree mark. The air will be infused with that quintessential summer essence, encouraging those who venture outdoors to embrace the radiance. A light, casual outfit made up of breathable fabrics will serve well, perhaps a linen shirt and comfortable shorts, allowing both comfort and style to come together seamlessly. As the day unfurls, it calls for leisurely strolls along the waterfront or perhaps a visit to one of Boston's quaint cafés, where the coffee flows as steadily as the sunlight filtering through open windows. There’s no rush; simply a moment to bask in the pleasure of an unhurried day, savoring each moment under the sun’s warm embrace.
